name: vpype-ttf
documentation: # vpype-ttf Vpype plugin for using True Type fonts for text. For `vpype`, see: https://github.com/abey79/vpype ## ftext A shortening of "font text", this command accepts the required arguments of a path to a TrueType, and a string of text to render, and an optional argument of the text size, and adds the rendered text lines to the document in the pipeline. ## Installation * Install repository: * `pip install vpype-ttf` ## Usage Have font file specified, eg: * `vpype ftext /usr/share/fonts/truetype/open-sans/OpenSans-Bold.ttf "vpype-ttf" show` ## Options vpype-ttf currently supports font scaling with the -s or --size option. * `vpype ftext -s 10cm /usr/share/fonts/truetype/open-sans/OpenSans-Bold.ttf "vpype!" show` ## Contributing Thanks to [Tatarize](https://github.com/tatarize) for creating this plugin in the first place. If you would like to contribute and expand vpype-ttf, bug reports, feature requests, and issues are welcome.

functions.name: vpype_ttf.ftext.ftext
documentation: Load a TrueType Font (TTF) file for text generation.
